name: search_docs
description: Search tutorials/SOPs shipped as Markdown files in the app repo (docs/webchat), not CMS database content. Returns short chunks with path citations. Use for how-to and field meaning questions. Do not use for live entity status — use get/list tools instead.

domain.description: Optional domain filter, e.g. voucher, package, config

top_k.description: Number of chunks. Default from host docs_top_k.
